creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE runs fine on the Sun Blade X6220 server.  Mine has 
two dual-core AMD Opteron 2218 CPUs, and 8 Gig of RAM.  RAID controller tested
and successfully rebuilds under FreeBSD.
URL: http://www.sun.com/servers/blades/x6220/

Fix: 

none0@pci0:0:0:0:	class=0x058000 card=0x00000000 chip=0x005e10de rev=0xa3 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Nvidia Corp'
    device     = 'nForce4 Memory Controller'
    class      = memory
